title: The Elusive Origin of Glioblastoma: Where Do We Stand?
snippet: Glioblastoma (GBM) remains one of the most lethal cancers, and despite advancements in understanding its underlying molecular signature, effective therapeutics are still lacking. The multifaceted challenges of designing treatments for GBM are compounded by the inability to identify a definitive cell of origin, the understanding of which is crucial for devel...
